title: Aureline notebook teaching continuity, checkpointed execution, and redaction-before-share flows
description: Boundary schema for notebook teaching continuity, checkpointed execution, and redaction-before-share records. Every record that crosses the teaching-continuity/checkpointed-redaction boundary (teaching continuity, checkpointed execution, redaction before share, teaching-continuity/checkpointed-redaction packet) projects through this schema. Raw notebook JSON bodies, raw cell source bytes, raw output bytes, raw kernel-protocol frames, raw widget state bytes, and raw URLs MUST NOT appear in any record; records carry refs only. Additive-optional fields do not bump the schema_version; repurposing an existing member is breaking.

notebook_teaching_continuity_checkpointe.description: Integer schema version for the notebook teaching continuity, checkpointed execution, and redaction-before-share module. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles.

opaque_ref.description: Opaque ref to another record (cell id, output id, session id, document id, actor id, etc.). Consumers resolve refs through the owning registry.

notebook_teaching_mode.description: Frozen teaching-mode vocabulary. Names the pedagogical mode so the teaching surface never silently degrades a guided exercise into unrestricted execution.

notebook_checkpoint_preference.description: Frozen checkpoint-preference vocabulary. Names whether the teaching flow prefers auto-checkpoints, manual checkpoints, or no checkpointing so the runtime can align sandbox and save-point behavior with pedagogy.

notebook_checkpoint_class.description: Frozen checkpoint-class vocabulary. Names the kind of execution checkpoint so consumers know whether the save point was created automatically, manually, or at a specific boundary.

notebook_sandbox_state.description: Frozen sandbox-state vocabulary. Names whether the execution is sandboxed, unsandboxed, pending sandbox creation, or failed to enter a sandbox.

notebook_rollback_posture.description: Frozen rollback-posture vocabulary. Names the honest state of a checkpoint so the UI never implies a rollback is exact when it is only approximate or no longer available.

notebook_redaction_class.description: Frozen redaction-class vocabulary. Names what category of content was redacted before share so the recipient knows the scope of omission.

notebook_redaction_trigger.description: Frozen redaction-trigger vocabulary. Names why redaction was applied so the UI can show truthful labels instead of generic 'content hidden' language.

current_step_index.description: Current step index in a guided exercise; null when not applicable.

total_steps.description: Total step count in a guided exercise; null when not applicable.

sandbox_required.description: Whether the teaching flow requires sandboxed execution.

sandbox_unavailable_explanation.description: Export-safe explanation when sandbox is required but unavailable.

checkpointed_at.description: UTC timestamp when the checkpoint was created.

honest_state_label.description: Human-readable honest-state label rendered for this checkpoint.

redacted_cell_refs.description: Opaque refs to the cells whose content was redacted.

redacted_output_refs.description: Opaque refs to the outputs that were redacted.

redaction_explanation.description: Export-safe explanation of what was redacted and why.

as_of.description: UTC date this packet is current as of.

teaching_modes.description: Closed vocabulary: every teaching mode declared by this module.

checkpoint_preferences.description: Closed vocabulary: every checkpoint preference declared by this module.

checkpoint_classes.description: Closed vocabulary: every checkpoint class declared by this module.

sandbox_states.description: Closed vocabulary: every sandbox state declared by this module.

rollback_postures.description: Closed vocabulary: every rollback posture declared by this module.

redaction_classes.description: Closed vocabulary: every redaction class declared by this module.

redaction_triggers.description: Closed vocabulary: every redaction trigger declared by this module.
